landing.heroDesc: An all-in-one novel creation assistant. From worldbuilding, character design, outline planning to scene and chapter writing — powered by AI to help you forge inspiration into a complete story.
landing.worldbuildingDesc: Define your story's world: genre, era, geography, and world rules. AI can generate a complete world based on a theme concept.
landing.characterDesc: Create vivid characters: name, role, personality, backstory, and appearance. AI can generate compelling characters based on your world.
landing.outlineDesc: Plan story structure: set the story title and synopsis, split into chapters. AI can automatically generate chapter outlines based on background info.
landing.sceneDesc: Break chapters into specific scenes, plan each scene's title and summary. AI can auto-split chapters and generate complete scene content.
landing.chapterDesc: Write complete chapter content and manage each chapter's status. AI can auto-generate ~2000-4000 word chapter content based on the outline.
landing.aiAssistDesc: Every module has built-in AI generation. Customize API key and model. From worldbuilding to chapter writing, AI accelerates your entire creative process.

projects.title: Project Management
projects.subtitle: Manage your novel projects
projects.noNovelsDesc: Create your first novel and begin your creative journey

dashboard.writingStyleDesc: Once set, all AI-generated content will automatically adopt this style
dashboard.writingStylePlaceholder: e.g. Gu Long-style martial arts, cold and restrained, concise dialogue, gloomy environmental descriptions...
dashboard.deleteWarning: Once deleted, all worldbuilding, characters, outlines, scenes, and chapter content will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
dashboard.deleteConfirmText: Please enter the project name {name} to confirm deletion:
dashboard.noCreationDataDesc: Start with worldbuilding and gradually construct your story world

worldbuilding.title: Worldbuilding Planner
worldbuilding.aiGenerateDesc: Enter a theme concept and let AI build a complete world for you
worldbuilding.aiPlaceholder: Enter a theme concept, e.g.: Steampunk Magic Academy
worldbuilding.name: Title
worldbuilding.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the overview of this world...
worldbuilding.rulesPlaceholder: Magic system, technology rules, social structure...
worldbuilding.noWorldbuildingDesc: Use AI generation to create your first world!
worldbuilding.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this worldbuilding? This action cannot be undone.

character.title: Character Manager
character.aiGenerateDesc: Describe character traits and let AI create the character for you
character.aiPlaceholder: Describe the character, e.g.: A silent wandering swordsman burdened with the revenge of his destroyed clan...
character.name: Name
character.noCharactersDesc: Use AI generation to create your first character!
character.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this character? This action cannot be undone.

outline.title: Story Outline Generator
outline.aiGenerateDesc: Enter an outline direction and let AI plan your story structure
outline.aiPlaceholder: Outline direction description, e.g.: A fantasy adventure about revenge and redemption...
outline.name: Outline Title
outline.chapterDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.
outline.noOutlines: Use AI generation to create your first outline!
outline.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this outline? This action cannot be undone.

scene.title: Scene Planning
scene.aiSplitDesc: Based on chapter content, let AI automatically split into multiple scenes
scene.aiPlaceholder: Scene direction description, e.g.: Each scene about 800 words, fast-paced...
scene.noScenes: No scenes for this chapter yet
scene.noScenesDesc: Use AI splitting to create scenes!
scene.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this scene? This action cannot be undone.
scene.noChapterPrompt: This outline has no chapters yet. Please go back to the outline editor to add chapters.

chapter.title: Chapter Generator
chapter.selectChapterPrompt: Select a chapter from the left
chapter.noSummary: Not yet generated, click the button above to generate
chapter.descriptionPlaceholder: Chapter description (optional, e.g. style settings, special requirements)

settings.title: LLM API Settings
settings.subtitle: Each module can independently configure its API. Leave blank to use DEFAULT settings.
settings.baseUrlPlaceholder: Leave blank to use default (must start with http:// or https://)
settings.systemPromptPlaceholder: Leave blank to use built-in default
settings.userPromptTemplateHint: (Use {var} to insert variables, varies by module)
settings.userPromptTemplatePlaceholder: Leave blank to use built-in default
